zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Somery於大約1233年出生在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾杜德利時，她的父親Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley40歲，母親Nichole d'Aubigny24歲。她於1271年1月26日之前與Ralph Cromwell結婚。她去世於1293年3月5日之後在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾克倫威爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Somery于大约1233年出生在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾杜德利时，她的父亲Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley40岁，母亲Nichole d'Aubigny24岁。她于1271年1月26日之前与Ralph Cromwell结婚。她去世于1293年3月5日之后在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾克倫威爾。

nameMeanings.name: Somery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Abelino, Adela, Alberto, Alfredo, Ana, Angel, Asuncion, Domingo, Elena, Emiliano, Emilio, Eusebio.
Spanish: possibly a habitational name from La Somera in Cuenca province, named from somero ‘shallow’. This surname is most common in the Philippines.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Somery was born about 1233, in Dudley, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley, was 40 and her mother, Nichole d'Aubigny, was 24. She married Ralph Cromwell before 26 January 1271. She died after 5 March 1293, in Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Somery est née environ 1233, à Dudley, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Nichole d'Aubigny, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph Cromwell avant 26 janvier 1271. Elle est décédée après 5 mars 1293, à Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Somery um 1233 in Dudley, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley 40 und ihre Mutter Nichole d'Aubigny 24. Sie hat vor 26. Januar 1271 Ralph Cromwell geheiratet. Sie starb nach 5. März 1293 in Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Somery è nata il circa 1233 nel Dudley, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Nichole d'Aubigny, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Ralph Cromwell prima del 26 gennaio 1271. Morì dopo il 5 marzo 1293, nel Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Someryが約1233年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアダドリーで生まれた時，父Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudleyは40歳，母Nichole d'Aubignyは24歳であった。1271年1月26日以前にRalph Cromwellと結婚した。彼女は1293年3月5日以後にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアクロムウエルで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Somery(이)가 대략 1233년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 드들리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Nichole d'Aubigny(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1271년 1월 26일 이전 Ralph Cromwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1293년 3월 5일 이후 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 크롬웰에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Somery nasceu aproximadamente 1233, em Dudley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Nichole d'Aubigny, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph Cromwell antes 26 de janeiro de 1271. Ela faleceu após 5 de março de 1293, em Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Somery родилась около 1233 г. в местности дудли, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Nichole d'Aubigny, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph Cromwell перед 26 январь 1271 г. Она умерла после 5 марта 1293 г. в местности кромвелл, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.
